positive: A minimalist, stylized graphic of a cosmic wave cresting over a serene, symmetrical mountain range. The wave should feature iridescent gradient blues and teals, transitioning into deep violet at the peaks. The mountain range is depicted with clean, sharp silhouettes in slate gray and muted sage green. Focus on strong contrast and negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for print. Studio lighting, vector art style, extremely clean lines, flat graphic design, suitable for screen printing on apparel, inspired by Art Deco geometry and nature elements.
